transcript: Speaker A (AI Avatar): This coffee is very hot. Speaker B (Human Male): இந்த coffee ரொம்ப சூடா இருக்கு. [This coffee is very hot.] The coffee is very hot. எனக்கு இந்த coffee taste ரொம்ப பிடிச்சிருக்கு. [I like the taste of this coffee.] Speaker A: I like the taste of this coffee. Speaker B: I like the taste of this coffee. Speaker C (Human Female): ஹே, நீ English எங்க கத்துக்குற? [Hey, where are you learning English?] Speaker B: SpeakX app-ல AI teacher கிட்ட கத்துக்கிட்டு இருக்கேன். [I am learning from an AI teacher on the SpeakX app.] Speaker C: என்னது? புரியலையே? [What? I don't understand?] Speaker B: இது ஒரு app. இதுல நீங்க daily AI English teacher கூட practice பண்ண முடியும். இப்ப இருக்க காலத்துல English தெரியலேன்னா job கிடைக்காது. ஏன்? Respect கூட கிடைக்காது. கரெக்டா? அதனாலதான் நான் daily just 10 to 15 minutes SpeakX app-ல இருக்க AI teacher கூட practice பண்றேன். Just 10 days தான் ஆச்சு. இப்ப என் English ரொம்பவே improve ஆயிருச்சு. இப்ப நான் பயமில்லாம confident-ஆ English பேசுறேன். அதுவும் ரொம்ப affordable. [This is an app. In this, you can practice daily with an AI English teacher. In today's times, if you don't know English, you won't get a job. Why? You won't even get respect. Correct? That's why I practice daily for just 10 to 15 minutes with the AI teacher on the SpeakX app. It's only been 10 days. Now my English has improved a lot. Now I speak English confidently without fear. And it's very affordable.] Speaker C: நானும் English கத்துக்கணும்னு ஆசை. ஆனா இந்த மாதிரி courses-லாம் costly-ஆ இருக்குமே? [I also want to learn English. But wouldn't these kinds of courses be costly?] Speaker B: இல்ல, 7 days free trial இருக்கு. [No, there is a 7 days free trial.] Speaker C: ஓ சூப்பர்! நான் இப்பவே SpeakX app download பண்றேன். [Oh super! I will download the SpeakX app right now.] Speaker D (Voiceover): உடனே SpeakX app download பண்ணி AI teacher-ஓட English கத்துக்கோங்க. [Download the SpeakX app immediately and learn English with an AI teacher.]

summary: A split-screen ad shows a man practicing English with an AI avatar on SpeakX. When a friend asks about it, he explains that English is crucial for jobs and respect, and that the app offers affordable daily practice. After hearing about the 7-day free trial, she decides to download it immediately.
